sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91143" key="pterorru/msis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτερο-ρρύμσις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n91143.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">moulting</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:24p.470M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24p.470M.</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4017.tlg001:82:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Syrian.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">82.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
